sandboxFiles.name: Daily_Summary_2026-07-09.md
sandboxFiles.content:
### Your Daily Briefing

Here is a quick summary of your active development focus and workspace files for today. Your primary activity is centered on integrating and syncing the **Google Cloud Policy Simulator API** libraries.

#### Key Focus Areas Today
*   **IAM Policy Simulation:** You are working closely with Policy Simulator Replay APIs, specifically managing how access changes (`AccessStateDiff`) are calculated and compared between baseline and simulated policies.
*   **API Version Migration:** You are actively referencing and comparing stable versus beta TypeScript type definitions (`v1` and `v1beta1`) to map structural differences in how principal memberships and binding explanations are resolved.

#### Active Files & Sources
*   [📄 v1beta1.d.ts](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1SDjIAb7lGDf_t370L89xtyLZ527xc5HZ) — Beta type definitions for simulating IAM policy evaluations.
*   [📄 v1.d.ts](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1u_uUf2BOo-J41pTocU-4V4dVsiK0tPdg) — Stable version API structures for Policy Simulator context.
*   [📄 v1beta1.d.ts (Duplicate)](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1T2lexppdp8KgwFSSDxtiODncRpHNqtXR) — Beta reference file detailing access tuples and binding explanations.
*   [📄 v1.d.ts (Duplicate)](https://drive.google.com/open?id=16IQ6KHGEfqohWsGi-8WCOPTVK3SS4sOV) — Main v1 typings for project schemas.
*   [📄 v1beta1.d.ts (Local Copy)](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1r0a12Y9GqVKBjlEmOOiMjZav8NDHj9Q2) — Beta schemas covering audit configurations and IAM bindings.

#### Recommended Next Steps
Confirm if your simulation logic requires the newer beta fields (such as updated access change logs) or if the stable `v1` structure is sufficient for your production deployment.
